image.title: NAP Radanliev, D De Roure, R Walton, M Van Kleek, RM Montalvo, O Santos, L Maddox, S Cannady

item.title: COVID-19 what have we learned? The rise of social machines and connected devices in pandemic management following the concepts of predictive, preventive and personalized medicine.
